description: A logistics system needs a robust PL/SQL API for warehouse transfers. Connect to the Oracle HR database (localhost:1521/XEPDB1, user: hr, pass: hr123) to implement the inventory management system. Ensure the INVENTORY table has a check constraint named 'CHK_INV_QTY_NONNEG' preventing negative quantities. Develop a package named 'INV_MANAGER' containing a procedure 'TRANSFER_STOCK(p_sku, p_from_wh, p_to_wh, p_qty)' that performs atomic stock transfers between warehouses, handles non-existent destination rows via insertion, logs all transactions to the TRANSFER_LOG table, and implements proper transaction control (COMMIT/ROLLBACK) with custom error raising (-20001 to -20999). Verify the implementation by executing a transfer of 5 units of 'SKU-LOGI-MX3' from Warehouse 1 to Warehouse 2.
